description.value:
Border-healer sutures and stubborn vows — Beinmark border-healers stitch wounds and vows in the same breath; their suturing thread carries the intent that the patient will not give up, and the implement carries that same refusal forward into magic.

Effect: Once per encounter, when you spend a Recovery, you also gain temporary Stamina equal to your Might score.

Rules: Recoveries; Temporary Stamina; Encounter.

project.prerequisites: An implement of exceptional quality; a length of Beinmark healer's suture thread still knotted with an oath
